title: dracaena forskaliana
intro: Dracaena forskaliana, also known as Forskohlii or Indian Coleus, is a plant species native to tropical regions of India and Africa. The plant contains forskolin, a compound with medicinal properties, particularly in lowering blood pressure and as a bronchodilator. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight management. Traditionally, forskolin is prepared as an herbal supplement, often in capsule or tablet form, although its effectiveness and safety as a dietary supplement are still being researched.
